originalTitle: Archer stock rips 20% higher as company unveils military craft with Anduril
summary: Archer and its eVTOL peers are racing for FAA certification to start flying their air taxis commercially.
content:
Archer Aviation CEO Adam Goldstein said the company is laser-focused on getting its air taxis certified and flying by the 2028 Olympics in Los Angeles .

"It's always been an ambitious goal," he told CNBC's Phil LeBeau on Monday at the Farnborough Air Show in the U.K. "It's still an ambitious goal, but we're certainly going to try our hardest to get there."

Archer on Monday unveiled its Thunder autonomous vertical takeoff and landing defense craft with Anduril , designed to accompany crewed aircraft and helicopters. The companies first joined forces in 2024.

Archer is widely known for creating electric vertical takeoff and landing aircraft aimed at cutting emissions and traffic in crowded urban areas. However, the technology has faced a series of regulatory and infrastructure hurdles that have pushed back certification timelines .

In recent months, Archer and its peers have benefitted from President Donald Trump 's latest eVTOL pilot program aimed at accelerating deployment, with testing across 26 states.

"This is really critical to gaining the trust of the public and the trust of the regulators that will ultimately lead to our certification," Goldstein told CNBC. "That step is going to be hugely critical in order to allow us to meet those timelines."

Archer and its peers have also steadily expanded their defense portfolios as the U.S. military invests in new technology on the battlefield and adds more artificial intelligence tools.

Goldstein called defense applications a "huge market" for Archer amid rising geopolitical tensions abroad. The aircraft also doesn't require the same certification process necessary for commercial use cases, he added.

"The applications we can bring in the defense world are quite impressive and very much needed for the warfighter," he said.
chineseTitle: 随着公司与 Anduril 合作推出军用飞机，Archer 股价上涨 20%
chineseSummary: Archer 及其 eVTOL 同行正在竞相申请美国联邦航空局 (FAA) 认证，以开始将其空中出租车商业化。
chineseContent:
Archer Aviation 首席执行官 Adam Goldstein 表示，该公司正专注于让其空中出租车获得认证，并在 2028 年洛杉矶奥运会之前飞行。

“这一直是一个雄心勃勃的目标，”他周一在英国范堡罗航展上告诉 CNBC 的 Phil LeBeau，“这仍然是一个雄心勃勃的目标，但我们肯定会尽最大努力实现这一目标。”

Archer 周一与 Anduril 一起推出了其 Thunder 自主垂直起降防御飞机，旨在陪伴载人飞机和直升机。两家公司于 2024 年首次联手。

阿彻因制造电动垂直起降飞机而闻名，旨在减少拥挤城市地区的排放和交通。然而，该技术面临一系列监管和基础设施障碍，导致认证时间表被推迟。

近几个月来，Archer 及其同行受益于唐纳德·特朗普总统最新的 eVTOL 试点计划，该计划旨在加速部署，并在 26 个州进行了测试。

戈德斯坦对 CNBC 表示：“这对于赢得公众和监管机构的信任至关重要，最终我们将获得认证。” “为了让我们能够满足这些时间表，这一步骤将非常关键。”

随着美国军方在战场上投资新技术并增加更多人工智能工具，Archer 及其同行也稳步扩大了其国防产品组合。

戈尔茨坦称，在国外地缘政治紧张局势加剧之际，国防应用对阿切尔来说是一个“巨大的市场”。他补充说，该飞机也不需要商业用例所需的相同认证流程。

“我们可以在国防领域带来的应用非常令人印象深刻，并且是战士非常需要的，”他说。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
